song.title: Hallelujah to My King
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C C B V3 C B C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] . C#m B 1) O how strong the power of Jesus' name, . A E B It is stronger than any other name; . C#m B How sweet the vict'ry that bore my shame, . A E B Took the burden of my sin away.
[C] Chorus . E A Hallelujah! What a Savior! . E B I owe everything to Him; . C#m A Hallelujah! What a Savior! . E B C#m . . . | E . B/D# . | Hallelujah to my King!
[V2] 2) O how great the kindness Our God has shown: We were strangers, Now we're called His own; His grace has welcomed The sinner home, Tender mercies Lead us to the throne.
[B] Bridge . C#m . . . | A . . . | C#m . . . | A . . . | Hallelujah! Hallelujah to my King!
---
[V3] 3) O what peace the Spirit of Jesus brings; Through the trials, He will carry me; One day in Glory Our eyes will meet, Filled with wonder, All the saints will sing...
[E] 1) O how strong the power of Jesus' name, It is stronger than any other name; How sweet the vict'ry that bore my shame, Took the burden of my sin away. Chorus Hallelujah! What a Savior! I owe everything to Him; Hallelujah! What a Savior! Hallelujah to my King! 2) O how great the kindness our God has shown: We were strangers, now we're called His own; His grace has welcomed the sinner home, Tender mercies lead us to the throne. Bridge Hallelujah! Hallelujah to my King! 3) O what peace the Spirit of Jesus brings; Through the trials, He will carry me; One day in Glory our eyes will meet, Filled with wonder, all the saints will sing...
